BSCI - Biological Sciences Program

BSCI103 The World of Biology (4 Credits) An introduction to modern biology for the non-science major. Major themes include molecular biology, cell biology, evolution and organismal biology. Relevance of study of biology to modern human life will be emphasized. Additional Information: Not acceptable for degree requirements in Biological Sciences, Chemistry, or Biochemistry.

BSCI120 Insects (3 Credits) A survey of the major groups of insects, their natural history, and their relationships with humans and their environment. Course not acceptable toward major requirements in Biological Sciences, Chemistry or Biochemistry.
